case_title: ANTONIA GARAFOLA et al VS. COMCAST

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GARAFOLA, ANTONIA FREENEY, FELECIA AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
